policy.note: This guard validates innovation scout policy and candidate coverage only.

findings.message: Scout schema_version must be 0.1.
Scout status must be ready.
Scout must be scout-only.
Scout must not install tools.
Scout must not clone repositories.
Scout must not read private content.
Scout must not run private OCR.
Scout must not run private embeddings.
Scout must not run training.
Scout public-ready must remain 0.
Scout must include at least eight candidates.
Scout must include markitdown.
Scout must include docling.
Scout must include qwen3_embedding_reranker.
Scout must include ifcopenshell.
Candidate markitdown must include a source URL.
Candidate markitdown must use a primary source.
Candidate markitdown must not install now.
Candidate markitdown must not allow private content now.
Candidate markitdown priority must be 1-5.
Candidate docling must include a source URL.
Candidate docling must use a primary source.
Candidate docling must not install now.
Candidate docling must not allow private content now.
Candidate docling priority must be 1-5.
Candidate deepseek_ocr must include a source URL.
Candidate deepseek_ocr must use a primary source.
Candidate deepseek_ocr must not install now.
Candidate deepseek_ocr must not allow private content now.
Candidate deepseek_ocr priority must be 1-5.
Candidate qwen3_embedding_reranker must include a source URL.
Candidate qwen3_embedding_reranker must use a primary source.
Candidate qwen3_embedding_reranker must not install now.
Candidate qwen3_embedding_reranker must not allow private content now.
Candidate qwen3_embedding_reranker priority must be 1-5.
Candidate qwen3_vl_embedding must include a source URL.
Candidate qwen3_vl_embedding must use a primary source.
Candidate qwen3_vl_embedding must not install now.
Candidate qwen3_vl_embedding must not allow private content now.
Candidate qwen3_vl_embedding priority must be 1-5.
Candidate ifcopenshell must include a source URL.
Candidate ifcopenshell must use a primary source.
Candidate ifcopenshell must not install now.
Candidate ifcopenshell must not allow private content now.
Candidate ifcopenshell priority must be 1-5.
Candidate topologicpy must include a source URL.
Candidate topologicpy must use a primary source.
Candidate topologicpy must not install now.
Candidate topologicpy must not allow private content now.
Candidate topologicpy priority must be 1-5.
Candidate speckle must include a source URL.
Candidate speckle must use a primary source.
Candidate speckle must not install now.
Candidate speckle must not allow private content now.
Candidate speckle priority must be 1-5.
Candidate paper2poster must include a source URL.
Candidate paper2poster must use a primary source.
Candidate paper2poster must not install now.
Candidate paper2poster must not allow private content now.
Candidate paper2poster priority must be 1-5.
Recommended sequence must include private gate.

next_actions: Use the scout to prioritize source-free fixture contracts.
Do not install or clone candidates during this block.
Refresh the scout when owner unlocks Source Root or when a tool becomes immediately actionable.
